Platform: Generic 'Chandigarh/Mohali IT Jobs' WhatsApp groups with specific invite links could not be verified as legitimate, active, or scam-free via web search - WhatsApp group invite links are not indexable and churn constantly (most expire within weeks). DO NOT pay any 'registration fee', 'resume processing fee', or 'training deposit' to join a job group or get an interview - this is the most common fresher scam pattern in this market. Legitimate employers and agencies are paid by the hiring company, never by candidates.

To find live, current Tricity-specific WhatsApp/Telegram groups: search Telegram's in-app search for 'Chandigarh jobs', 'Mohali IT jobs', 'Tricity freshers' - join 2-3, observe for a few days for scam patterns (fee requests, vague 'DM for details') before sharing any personal documents.
